response.justification: Candidate is a Staff/Senior engineer with 20+ years of experience applying for an entry-level junior/mid role. Strong technical fit on TypeScript, React, Node, PostgreSQL/SQL, and AWS, but severely overqualified, which creates high risk of disengagement, salary mismatch, and short tenure. No Nest.js or renewable-energy/construction domain signal. Berlin-based which fits on-site requirement, but the seniority gap is the dominant factor.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple Berlin product teams
Berlin-based, matching the high on-site presence requirement
Exposure to AI/MCP tooling aligns with nice-to-have LLM integration
concerns: Massive overqualification — Staff/Senior level applying to entry-level IC role
No Nest.js experience listed; PostgreSQL not explicitly called out (MongoDB/MySQL instead)
No renewable-energy, construction, or energy-consulting domain background
